name: Apple Charlotte Passover Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat together 3 egg yolks, 2/3 cup sugar, and 1 pinch salt until thick and lemon-colored.
2. Stir in 2 cups grated apples, 1/3 cup matzo meal, 2 teaspoons grated lemon rind, and 1 tablespoon plum brandy.
3. Fold in 3 stiffly beaten egg whites.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch spring form pan.
5. Sprinkle with 4 tablespoons ground pecans.
6. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes or until golden brown and firm.
7. Allow to cool before removing the sides of the pan.
